requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — COGUANOR NGO Standards (Harmonised with CISPR / IEC)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC辐射骚扰——COGUANOR NGO标准（与CISPR/IEC协调）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC輻射騷擾——COGUANOR NGO標準（與CISPR/IEC協調）

summary.en: Guatemala applies COGUANOR NGO (Norma Guatemalteca Obligatoria) standards for electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) emissions. COGUANOR is the Comisión Guatemalteca de Normas, and NGO designates mandatory standards. Many Guatemalan EMC standards are harmonised with CISPR publications and IEC standards (often via COPANT regional adoptions), including limits for conducted and radiated emissions from wireless and electronic devices. EMC test reports demonstrating compliance with the applicable NGO limits must be included in the SIT homologación technical dossier. Reports from ILAC-accredited or internationally recognised laboratories are generally accepted. Guatemala's adoption of CISPR-harmonised limits means that test data from FCC or CE/CISPR laboratory testing may overlap significantly with NGO requirements, though direct equivalence must be confirmed for each applicable NGO standard.
summary.zh: 危地马拉依据COGUANOR NGO（危地马拉强制性标准）标准对电磁兼容（EMC）辐射骚扰进行管控。COGUANOR为危地马拉标准委员会，NGO表示强制性标准。危地马拉许多EMC标准与CISPR出版物和IEC标准协调（通常通过COPANT区域采用），包括无线及电子设备传导和辐射骚扰限值。证明符合适用NGO限值的EMC检测报告须纳入SIT型式认可技术文件。通常接受ILAC认可或国际认可实验室出具的报告。危地马拉采用与CISPR协调的限值，意味着FCC或CE/CISPR实验室检测数据与NGO要求可能高度重叠，但每项适用NGO标准的直接等效性仍需逐一确认。
summary.zht: 瓜地馬拉依據COGUANOR NGO（瓜地馬拉強制性標準）標準對電磁相容（EMC）輻射騷擾進行管控。COGUANOR為瓜地馬拉標準委員會，NGO表示強制性標準。瓜地馬拉許多EMC標準與CISPR出版物和IEC標準協調（通常透過COPANT區域採用），包括無線及電子裝置傳導和輻射騷擾限值。證明符合適用NGO限值的EMC檢測報告須納入SIT型式認可技術文件。通常接受ILAC認可或國際認可實驗室出具的報告。瓜地馬拉採用與CISPR協調的限值，意味著FCC或CE/CISPR實驗室檢測數據與NGO要求可能高度重疊，但每項適用NGO標準的直接等效性仍需逐一確認。

standards_or_laws: COGUANOR NGO — Norma Guatemalteca Obligatoria; mandatory standards issued by Comisión Guatemalteca de Normas
CISPR 32 / IEC CISPR 32 (as adopted by COGUANOR) — EMC emissions requirements for multimedia equipment; harmonised basis for applicable NGO
CISPR 22 / IEC CISPR 22 (legacy, as applicable) — EMC emissions for information technology equipment
COPANT — Pan American Standards Commission; regional body through which many IEC/CISPR standards are adopted into NGO framework

summary.en: In China, EMC emissions for wireless and electronic devices are governed by GB standards harmonised with CISPR publications. Key standards include GB 9254 (EMC emissions for IT equipment, harmonised with CISPR 22/32) and GB 15707. EMC testing is conducted by CNAS-accredited laboratories and forms part of the CCC (China Compulsory Certification) and SRRC type-approval process. Chinese GB EMC standards and COGUANOR NGO standards both derive from CISPR, so test data may overlap — but the Guatemalan NGO standard reference and the SIT dossier requirement must be satisfied independently.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线及电子设备的EMC辐射骚扰由与CISPR出版物协调的GB标准管控。主要标准包括GB 9254（IT设备EMC辐射骚扰，与CISPR 22/32协调）和GB 15707。EMC测试由CNAS认可实验室进行，并构成CCC（中国强制认证）和SRRC型号核准流程的一部分。中国GB EMC标准和COGUANOR NGO标准均源自CISPR，检测数据可能有重叠——但仍须独立满足危地马拉NGO标准引用要求和SIT文件要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線及電子裝置的EMC輻射騷擾由與CISPR出版物協調的GB標準管控。主要標準包括GB 9254（IT裝置EMC輻射騷擾，與CISPR 22/32協調）和GB 15707。EMC測試由CNAS認可實驗室進行，並構成CCC（中國強制認證）和SRRC型號核准流程的一部分。中國GB EMC標準和COGUANOR NGO標準均源自CISPR，檢測數據可能有重疊——但仍須獨立滿足瓜地馬拉NGO標準引用要求和SIT文件要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 9254 — Chinese EMC emissions standard for IT equipment, harmonised with CISPR 22/32
GB 15707 — Chinese radiated emissions standard for general electronic equipment
CNAS (China National Accreditation Service) — accreditation body for Chinese EMC test laboratories

gap.en: Chinese GB EMC emissions standards and COGUANOR NGO emissions standards both derive from CISPR, so test data from CCC or FCC EMC testing may be partially applicable. However, the specific NGO standard reference cited in the SIT dossier must match the applicable Guatemalan mandatory standard. Test reports must identify the applicable NGO and demonstrate compliance with its specific limits and test conditions. Verify which current NGO standards apply to the specific device category with a Guatemalan regulatory professional, as the COGUANOR NGO catalogue evolves and not all CISPR editions are adopted simultaneously.
gap.zh: 中国GB EMC辐射骚扰标准和COGUANOR NGO辐射骚扰标准均源自CISPR，因此CCC或FCC EMC检测数据可能部分适用。但SIT文件中引用的特定NGO标准须与适用的危地马拉强制性标准一致。检测报告须注明适用的NGO并证明符合其具体限值和测试条件。由于COGUANOR NGO目录持续演变，不同CISPR版本的采用时间不一，请向危地马拉监管专业人士核验适用于具体设备类别的现行NGO标准。
gap.zht: 中國GB EMC輻射騷擾標準和COGUANOR NGO輻射騷擾標準均源自CISPR，因此CCC或FCC EMC檢測數據可能部分適用。但SIT文件中引用的特定NGO標準須與適用的瓜地馬拉強制性標準一致。檢測報告須注明適用的NGO並證明符合其具體限值和測試條件。由於COGUANOR NGO目錄持續演變，不同CISPR版本的採用時間不一，請向瓜地馬拉監管專業人士核驗適用於具體裝置類別的現行NGO標準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — COGUANOR NGO EMC emissions compliance required as part of SIT homologación technical dossier for wireless and electronic equipment in Guatemala
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 9254 and related GB EMC emissions standards required as part of CCC certification and SRRC type approval in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] COGUANOR NGO EMC emissions standards (harmonised with CISPR/IEC) are mandatory for wireless and electronic equipment sold in Guatemala and must be addressed in the SIT homologación dossier. Chinese GB EMC test data may overlap but the applicable NGO standard citation and test conditions must be confirmed. Verify the current NGO standards applicable to your device category with a qualified Guatemalan regulatory professional before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] COGUANOR NGO EMC辐射骚扰标准（与CISPR/IEC协调）对在危地马拉销售的无线及电子设备为强制性要求，须在SIT型式认可文件中予以说明。中国GB EMC检测数据可能有重叠，但须确认适用NGO标准引用及测试条件。进入市场前请向合格的危地马拉监管专业人士核验适用于您设备类别的现行NGO标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] COGUANOR NGO EMC輻射騷擾標準（與CISPR/IEC協調）對在瓜地馬拉銷售的無線及電子裝置為強制性要求，須在SIT型式認可文件中予以說明。中國GB EMC檢測數據可能有重疊，但須確認適用NGO標準引用及測試條件。進入市場前請向合格的瓜地馬拉監管專業人士核驗適用於您裝置類別的現行NGO標準。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity — COGUANOR NGO Standards (Harmonised with IEC 61000 series)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC抗扰度——COGUANOR NGO标准（与IEC 61000系列协调）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC抗擾度——COGUANOR NGO標準（與IEC 61000系列協調）

summary.en: Guatemala's COGUANOR NGO framework includes mandatory EMC immunity requirements for electronic equipment, harmonised with the IEC 61000 series (electrostatic discharge, radiated immunity, electrical fast transient, surge, conducted immunity, voltage dips, and interruptions). Wireless and IoT devices intended for the Guatemalan market must demonstrate immunity performance consistent with the applicable NGO immunity standards. Immunity test reports from ILAC-accredited or internationally recognised laboratories should be included in the SIT homologación technical dossier. The specific immunity standard tiers (residential, commercial, industrial) applicable to the device's intended environment must be identified. COPANT regional adoptions of IEC 61000 series may form the basis of the applicable NGO.
summary.zh: 危地马拉COGUANOR NGO框架包括针对电子设备的强制性EMC抗扰度要求，与IEC 61000系列（静电放电、辐射抗扰度、电快速瞬变、浪涌、传导抗扰度、电压暂降和中断）协调。面向危地马拉市场的无线及物联网设备须证明符合适用NGO抗扰度标准的抗扰度性能。经ILAC认可或国际认可实验室出具的抗扰度检测报告应纳入SIT型式认可技术文件。须明确适用于设备预期使用环境（住宅、商业、工业）的具体抗扰度标准等级。IEC 61000系列的COPANT区域采用版本可作为适用NGO的基础。
summary.zht: 瓜地馬拉COGUANOR NGO框架包括針對電子裝置的強制性EMC抗擾度要求，與IEC 61000系列（靜電放電、輻射抗擾度、電快速暫態、突波、傳導抗擾度、電壓暫降和中斷）協調。面向瓜地馬拉市場的無線及物聯網裝置須證明符合適用NGO抗擾度標準的抗擾度性能。經ILAC認可或國際認可實驗室出具的抗擾度檢測報告應納入SIT型式認可技術文件。須明確適用於裝置預期使用環境（住宅、商業、工業）的具體抗擾度標準等級。IEC 61000系列的COPANT區域採用版本可作為適用NGO的基礎。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61000-4 series (as adopted by COGUANOR NGO via COPANT) — EMC immunity test methods including ESD (IEC 61000-4-2), radiated immunity (IEC 61000-4-3), EFT (IEC 61000-4-4), surge (IEC 61000-4-5), conducted immunity (IEC 61000-4-6)
IEC 61000-3 series (as adopted) — harmonic current emissions and voltage fluctuations / flicker limits
COGUANOR NGO — Norma Guatemalteca Obligatoria; mandatory standards framework
COPANT — Pan American Standards Commission; regional body facilitating IEC/ISO adoption into national NGO standards

summary.en: In China, EMC immunity for electronic devices is governed by GB/T standards harmonised with the IEC 61000 series, including GB/T 17626 series (immunity test methods for ESD, radiated immunity, EFT, surge, and conducted immunity). Immunity testing is conducted by CNAS-accredited laboratories as part of CCC and SRRC certification. Chinese GB/T 17626 series and COGUANOR NGO immunity standards both derive from IEC 61000, so significant test data overlap may exist — but the specific NGO citation and applicable test level must be confirmed for the Guatemalan dossier.
summary.zh: 在中国，电子设备的EMC抗扰度由与IEC 61000系列协调的GB/T标准管控，包括GB/T 17626系列（静电放电、辐射抗扰度、电快速瞬变、浪涌、传导抗扰度的抗扰度测试方法）。抗扰度测试由CNAS认可实验室进行，作为CCC和SRRC认证的一部分。中国GB/T 17626系列与COGUANOR NGO抗扰度标准均源自IEC 61000，可能存在大量检测数据重叠——但须为危地马拉文件确认具体NGO引用和适用测试等级。
summary.zht: 在中國，電子裝置的EMC抗擾度由與IEC 61000系列協調的GB/T標準管控，包括GB/T 17626系列（靜電放電、輻射抗擾度、電快速暫態、突波、傳導抗擾度的抗擾度測試方法）。抗擾度測試由CNAS認可實驗室進行，作為CCC和SRRC認證的一部分。中國GB/T 17626系列與COGUANOR NGO抗擾度標準均源自IEC 61000，可能存在大量檢測數據重疊——但須為瓜地馬拉文件確認具體NGO引用和適用測試等級。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17626 series — Chinese EMC immunity test method standards, harmonised with IEC 61000-4 series
GB/T 17625 series — Chinese harmonic current emissions and voltage fluctuation / flicker standards
CNAS (China National Accreditation Service) — accreditation body for Chinese EMC test laboratories

gap.en: Chinese GB/T immunity test data from CCC testing may be substantially reusable for COGUANOR NGO immunity compliance, as both reference the IEC 61000-4 series. However, the specific NGO standard, applicable test levels, and intended environment classification must be confirmed and cited in the SIT dossier. The test report must reference the Guatemalan NGO (not merely IEC or GB/T) to satisfy the SIT documentation requirement. Confirm with a Guatemalan regulatory professional which current COGUANOR NGO immunity standards apply to the device category.
gap.zh: 来自CCC认证的中国GB/T抗扰度检测数据可能在很大程度上可用于COGUANOR NGO抗扰度合规，因两者均以IEC 61000-4系列为基础。但须在SIT文件中确认并引用具体NGO标准、适用测试等级和预期使用环境分类。检测报告须引用危地马拉NGO（而非仅IEC或GB/T）以满足SIT文件要求。请向危地马拉监管专业人士确认适用于该设备类别的现行COGUANOR NGO抗扰度标准。
gap.zht: 來自CCC認證的中國GB/T抗擾度檢測數據可能在很大程度上可用於COGUANOR NGO抗擾度合規，因兩者均以IEC 61000-4系列為基礎。但須在SIT文件中確認並引用具體NGO標準、適用測試等級和預期使用環境分類。檢測報告須引用瓜地馬拉NGO（而非僅IEC或GB/T）以滿足SIT文件要求。請向瓜地馬拉監管專業人士確認適用於該裝置類別的現行COGUANOR NGO抗擾度標準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — COGUANOR NGO EMC immunity compliance required as part of SIT homologación technical dossier for wireless and electronic equipment in Guatemala
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 17626 series immunity testing required as part of CCC certification and SRRC type approval in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] COGUANOR NGO EMC immunity standards (harmonised with IEC 61000 series) are mandatory for wireless and electronic equipment sold in Guatemala and must be addressed in the SIT homologación dossier. Chinese GB/T immunity test data may overlap but the applicable NGO standard citation, test levels, and environment classification must be confirmed and explicitly referenced. Verify the current applicable COGUANOR NGO immunity standards with a qualified Guatemalan regulatory professional before market entry.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] COGUANOR NGO EMC抗扰度标准（与IEC 61000系列协调）对在危地马拉销售的无线及电子设备为强制性要求，须在SIT型式认可文件中予以说明。中国GB/T抗扰度检测数据可能有重叠，但须确认适用NGO标准引用、测试等级及使用环境分类，并明确引用。进入市场前请向合格的危地马拉监管专业人士核验适用的现行COGUANOR NGO抗扰度标准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] COGUANOR NGO EMC抗擾度標準（與IEC 61000系列協調）對在瓜地馬拉銷售的無線及電子裝置為強制性要求，須在SIT型式認可文件中予以說明。中國GB/T抗擾度檢測數據可能有重疊，但須確認適用NGO標準引用、測試等級及使用環境分類，並明確引用。進入市場前請向合格的瓜地馬拉監管專業人士核驗適用的現行COGUANOR NGO抗擾度標準。
